apps.name: Gitea (Code & Git)
apps.description: Self-hosted Git service with issue tracking and code review
apps.cli_connect: docker exec pg-gitea psql -U agent_rw -d gitea
apps.cli_command: docker exec pg-gitea psql -U agent_rw -d gitea -c

apps.name: Miniflux (RSS Reader)
apps.description: Minimalist RSS feed reader with categories and entries
apps.cli_connect: docker exec pg-miniflux psql -U agent_rw -d miniflux
apps.cli_command: docker exec pg-miniflux psql -U agent_rw -d miniflux -c

apps.name: Vikunja (Task Management)
apps.description: Open-source task and project management with labels and teams
apps.cli_connect: docker exec pg-vikunja psql -U agent_rw -d vikunja
apps.cli_command: docker exec pg-vikunja psql -U agent_rw -d vikunja -c

apps.name: Mattermost (Team Chat)
apps.description: Open-source team messaging with channels and direct messages
apps.cli_connect: docker exec pg-mattermost psql -U agent_rw -d mattermost
apps.cli_command: docker exec pg-mattermost psql -U agent_rw -d mattermost -c
